name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure)
notes: This Building Block defines when an Azure resource instance with managed identity is assigned a role to another resource. Resources with managed identity can access and managed other resources through Azure Active Directory Authentication.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Creation Success, Authentication.Role Assignment Success
when the event matches Object Type (custom) is not N/A
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Object ID (custom) and different Object Type (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Object ID (custom) and different Object Type (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Creation Success, Authentication.Role Assignment Success
AND when the event matches Object Type (custom) is not N/A
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Object ID (custom) and different Object Type (custom) in 5 minutes
